ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Bayern) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the region record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the region record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the trend belongs to */,
  "meldedatum" TEXT /* Date of the trend data */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference value for the trend */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Trend value for the region */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., economic, social, environmental) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the trend record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the trend record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the value belongs to */,
  "meldedatum" TEXT /* Date of the value data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value for the region */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value (e.g., GDP, unemployment rate) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the value data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the value record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the value record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the region or trend */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region or trend being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the access record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the access record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the dashboard belongs to */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_data" TEXT /* Serialized dashboard data (e.g., JSON) */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date and time the dashboard was last accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the dashboard record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the dashboard record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_dashboards_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region being exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the export occurred */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file in bytes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the export record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the export record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
